title: How We Upgraded From Java 8 And Why You Can (And Should) Do It Too
summary: My two minutes of fame during the Oracle Code One 2019 keynote
content:
My two minutes of fame during the Oracle Code One 2019 keynote

Is it vain to say that I'm really proud that I got asked by Oracle's JVM team to record a blip for the keynote? Because I am! 😊

Watch the video.
